title: Zum Teufel mit der Penne - Die Lümmel von der ersten Bank, 2. Teil
actors: Peter Alexander, Hans Kraus, Hannelore Elsner
plot: Dr. Peter Roland, a Geneva TV reporter and prankster, is ordered as punishment to cover the German schools. So he cheats his brother in law William 'Willy' Tell to steal his identity as exchange program teacher in Mommsen gymnasiu...
